onChange.script:
#   reset defect subname when defect category changes
	self.parent.parent.getChild("cntDefectSubname").getChild("Dropdown").props.value=''

config.script:
from java.util import Date
	from java.text import SimpleDateFormat
	from java.util import Date
	from java.text import SimpleDateFormat
	
	system.perspective.print("Inside retreve button")
	try:
	    startTime = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntFromDate").getChild("dateFrom").props.value
	    system.perspective.print("Start Time: -=>%s"%startTime)
	    endTime = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntToDate").getChild("dateTo").props.value
	    system.perspective.print("End Time: -=>%s"%endTime)
	    self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("flexTable").getChild("Table").props.data = ''
	    area = self.parent.parent.getChild("areaContainer").getChild("drpArea").props.value
	    line = self.parent.parent.getChild("lineContainer").getChild("drpLine").props.value
	    defectCategory = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntDefectContainer").getChild("Dropdown").props.value
	    defectName = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntDefectName").getChild("drpLine").props.value
	    defectSubname = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntDefectSubname").getChild("Dropdown").props.value
	    status=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntStatus").getChild("drpStatus").props.value
	    system.perspective.print("Line------>%s"%line)
	    system.perspective.print("area Param------>%s"%area)
	    system.perspective.print("defectCategory------>%s"%defectCategory)
	    system.perspective.print("defectName------>%s"%defectName)
	    system.perspective.print("defectSubname------>%s"%defectSubname)
	    system.perspective.print("outside area line  if")
	    if (area == -1 or area == '') :
	        system.perspective.print("Inside area  if")
	        message = "Please select Area "
	        system.perspective.print(message)
	        setMessage("Error", message)
	        system.perspective.print("end of IF")
	    else:
	        if (startTime is None or startTime == '') or (endTime is None or endTime == ''):
	            message = 'From date and To date cannot be Empty'
	            setMessage("Error", message)
	            system.perspective.print("end of IF2")
	        else:
	            try:
	                # Calculate the difference in days
	                diffMillis = endTime.getTime() - startTime.getTime()
	                diffDays = diffMillis / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)
	                system.perspective.print("diffDays %s" % diffDays)
	
	                if diffDays < 0:
	                    message = 'End date cannot be greater than Start Date'
	                    setMessage("Error", message)
	                    system.perspective.print("message %s" % message)
	                elif diffDays > 30:
	                    message = 'Date range cannot be greater than a Month'
	                    setMessage("Error", message)
	                    system.perspective.print("message %s" % message)
	                else:
	                    try:
	                        # Format dates
	                        startTimeFormatted = SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss").format(startTime)
	                        endTimeFormatted = SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss").format(endTime)
	                        system.perspective.print(startTimeFormatted)
	                        system.perspective.print(endTimeFormatted)
	
	                        
	                        cols = system.db.runNamedQuery(
	                            'Project_VECV/Report/defectReport/getData',
	                            {'FromDate': startTimeFormatted, 'ToDate': endTimeFormatted, 'Area': area, 'Line':line,'DefectCategory':defectCategory,'DefectName':defectName,'DefectSubname':defectSubname,'Status':status}
	                        )
	                        system.perspective.print("Fetched data-=> %s" %cols)
	                        
	                        # Update the table with the retrieved data
	                        self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("flexTable").getChild("Table").props.data = cols
	                        system.perspective.print("Fetched data Saved -=> %s" %cols)
	                        self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("flexTable").meta.visible = True
	                        message = 'Defect report fetch successful'
	                        setMessage("Success", message)
	                    except Exception as e:
	                        system.perspective.print("Error fetching data or updating table: %s" % str(e))
	                        setMessage("Error", "An error occurred while fetching data.")
	            except Exception as e:
	                system.perspective.print("Error in date range calculation: %s" % str(e))
	                setMessage("Error", "Invalid date range.")
	except Exception as e:
	    system.perspective.print("Unexpected error in script: %s" % str(e))
	    setMessage("Error", "An unexpected error occurred.")

def setMessage(status, message):
    system.perspective.sendMessage(
        messageType="setMessage",
        payload={
            "message": message,
            "status": status
        },
        scope="view"
    )

try:
       # Get the table data
       table_data = self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("flexTable").getChild("Table").props.data
       
       # Initialize message text
       message_text = ""
   
       # Check if the table contains data
       if table_data is not None and len(table_data) > 0:
           try:
               # If data is available, export it to Excel and trigger download
               excel_data = system.dataset.toExcel(True, [table_data])
               system.perspective.download(fileName="Defect Report.xlsx", data=excel_data)
               message = "Defect Report download successful to your local system in Excel format."
               setMessage("Success", message)
           except Exception as e:
               # Handle errors during Excel export or download
               system.perspective.print("Error during export or download: %s" % str(e))
               message = "An error occurred during export. Please try again or contact MES team"
               setMessage("Error", message)
       else:
           # Handle case where no data is available
           message = "No data available to export for given Inputs."
           setMessage("Error", message)
   
   except Exception as e:
       # Handle unexpected errors in the overall script
       system.perspective.print("Unexpected error: %s" % str(e))
       setMessage("Error", "An unexpected error occurred. Please Contact MES team")

def setMessage(status, message):
    system.perspective.sendMessage(
        messageType="setMessage",
        payload={
            "message": message,
            "status": status
        },
        scope="view"
    )

messageHandlers.script:
# Get the parameters from the message
	message = payload['message']  
	status = payload['status']
	
	# Update the Text Field's text
	self.props.text = message
	self.meta.visible=True
	# Apply the style class (from the payload or a default value)
	self.props.style.classes = "Project_VECV/Reports/successMsg" if status=='Success' else "Project_VECV/Common/StatusBlinking/Hold"
